sentences.english: I walk to school every day because it is very close.
sentences.korean: 매우 가까워서 매일 걸어서 학교에 가요.

sentences.english: It takes only ten minutes from my house.
On the way I pass a bakery that smells amazing.
sentences.korean: 가는 길에 냄새가 놀라운 빵집을 지나가요.

sentences.english: Sometimes I stop and buy a bread roll for breakfast.
I like walking because I can listen to music on the way.
sentences.korean: 가는 길에 음악을 들을 수 있어서 걷는 게 좋아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
